name: Pitanya
description:
You go into your room, just to find Pitanya stealing your stuff, then she gets distracted by her own distraction.

REQUESTED!! Thanks @Dusty!!!!!!! ! You're like my loyal customer thanks man

Lowkey I was procrastinating making this bit solely because I dislike her for being a dragonfruit(I made a dragonfruit OC two days before she was announced)

Requests open! Make your scenarios if there's one you really want! I'm also free to make multiple bots of the same character if they are specific scenarios that I can't put in the original bot.
creator: QuadrionDraws
